dashboard.title: Vault
dashboard.subtitle: REMINDER VAULT

empty.title: All caught up!
empty.description: Your private AI assistant is ready. Create a reminder to get started.

dashboard.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder?
dashboard.whatsapp_setup_desc: Please set your WhatsApp number in settings.
dashboard.email_setup_desc: Please set your Email in settings.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.example1: "Remind me to call Mom tomorrow at 3pm"

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.push_notifications_desc: Enable native system alerts for reminders.
settings.system_sound_desc: Toggle between our custom sound and the system default.
settings.delete_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all reminders? This cannot be undone.
settings.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out? Your encryption key will be cleared from memory.

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.description: Tap mic and speak your reminder naturally.
voice.unsupported: Voice recognition is only supported on certain browsers/platforms.
